title: 採点ラベルの切り替え

cases.name: 途中からbackupに切り替える

input.factory: () => ({ scorer: { name: "A", bonus: 5, build(score, index) { return this.name + "#" + (index + 1) + "=" + (score + this.bonus); } }, backup: { name: "B", bonus: 20 }, scores: [10, 0, 30, 5], switchIndex: 2 })

() => ({ scorer: { name: "通常", bonus: 10, build(score, index) { return this.name + "#" + (index + 1) + "=" + (score + this.bonus); } }, backup: { name: "代替", bonus: -1 }, scores: [1, 2, 3], switchIndex: 0 })

() => ({ scorer: { prefix: "N", offset: 0, build(score, index) { return this.prefix + ":" + index + ":" + (score * 2 + this.offset); } }, backup: { prefix: "S", offset: 100 }, scores: [7, 8], switchIndex: 2 })
() => ({ scorer: { name: "空", bonus: 3, build(score, index) { return this.name + "#" + (index + 1) + "=" + (score + this.bonus); } }, backup: { name: "予備", bonus: 9 }, scores: [], switchIndex: 0 })

() => ({ scorer: { name: "店内", bonus: 3, build(score, index) { return this.name + "#" + (index + 1) + "=" + (score + this.bonus); } }, backup: { name: "臨時", bonus: 7 }, scores: [0, 12, 4], switchIndex: 1 })
